chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-7768 of 2017 _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________ For Direction 1. For orders on MA No. 2019/2028 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 32351/2017 3. For hearing of main case. 19.01.2026 None present ------------------------- This is an old matter in the year 2017, pending for about 8 years, there is no progress in the matter and even today nobody is in attendance on behalf of petitioner. This Court is left with no option but to dismiss the instant petition, which is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Shafi
